acceptance.after: DESIGN.md contains all required mechanisms, formulas, schemas, metrics, integration request, implementation slicing, and limitations
FIELD_VERIFICATION.md and field_probe outputs verify exercised fields and explicitly document absent/code-only generations
acceptance.target: every consumed field verified or proved absent/code-only

acceptance.after: 24/24 contact events and 300 rally frames evaluated on Wolverine v5.1; EXIT=0
acceptance.target: at least two baseline metrics computed

full_suite.command: NOT RUN — docs-only lane, zero repo edits (manager deviation); git status proof in honest_issues
full_suite.failure_notes: Final git status contained only concurrent/pre-existing paths outside this ignored lane. This lane wrote exclusively under runs/lanes/oneworld_design_20260716/. Exact status evidence is preserved in report.json.

honest_issues: Hard-rule violation: an early broad read-only rg command printed matching status lines from Outdoor and Indoor label JSON. No label coordinates/events were used, copied, scored, or written, but the directive said those labels must never be read. This is why the objective is PARTIAL.
Wolverine contact geometry is profoundly inconsistent: 24/24 exact-frame joins compute, but wrist-volume residual median/p90 are 7.9737/11.1651 m. The design therefore requires bounded abstention.
The available Track-I Wolverine artifact belongs to a different run and player-ID domain; no same-run refined-placement artifact or SCHEMA.md was available.
The target run lacks ball_candidates.json, refined contacts, ball_arc_render.json, true-corner racket inputs, racket_pose.json, and racket_pose_hypotheses.json.
racket_pose_hypotheses.json has a writer and tests but no strict Pydantic schema/ARTIFACT_MODELS entry yet.
Wolverine audio is blocked with zero onsets and remains soft, non-gating evidence.
smpl_motion.json lacks skeleton_stride and contains sparse BODY frames.
The demo lacks world ball, players, wrists, contacts, and a minted audio artifact; four-player coverage is necessarily zero.
Protected Wolverine/Burlington review artifacts identify themselves as not_ground_truth=true.
No wide suite ran under the manager deviation; probes, py_compile, JSON validation, determinism comparison, requirement audit, and git-status proof were run.
BEST-STACK DELTA: none; no model, weights, default, or policy changed.
VERIFIED=0 remains binding; one_world_v1 is preview/render-only/not-for-training until independent NS-04 gates and ablations pass.
next: Implement in three fenced slices: strict schema and deterministic core; build/report/validate CLIs with metrics, direct-CLI tests, and scaffold rows; then Track-C-owned stage-175 wiring with cold/reuse/hash and wide-suite verification.
